summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PWA implementation and Item Catalogue redesign. All PWA files (manifest.json, sw.js, icon.svg) are properly served. Service Worker registers successfully. Item Catalogue shows correct responsive grid (2-column on mobile 375px, 5-column on desktop 1400px). Product Photography Style cards with clean white/neutral backgrounds, discount badges, stock status badges, hover overlays with View/Share buttons, Edit button, and dropdown menu all working correctly.

minor.issue: Some uploaded images return 404 - images may have been deleted or path issue

passed_tests: PWA manifest.json served at /manifest.json with 200 status
Service worker sw.js served at /sw.js with 200 status
App icon SVG accessible at /icons/icon.svg with 200 status
Service Worker registers successfully (confirmed via console log: 'SW registered: ServiceWorkerRegistration')
PWA manifest contains correct app metadata (name, short_name, icons, shortcuts)
Service worker implements network-first and cache-first strategies for offline support
Item Catalogue shows 2-column grid on mobile (375px viewport)
Item Catalogue shows 5-column grid on desktop (1400px viewport) - confirmed gridTemplateColumns: '203.188px 203.203px 203.203px 203.203px 203.188px'
Product cards have clean white/neutral background
Discount badges show percentage off correctly (70% OFF, 65% OFF, 30% OFF, 80% OFF)
Stock status badges show count in top-right corner (40, 20, 2, 1, etc.)
Stock badges are color-coded (green for high stock, amber/red for low stock)
Hover overlay shows View and Share buttons on desktop
Edit button works - opens Edit Item modal with tabs (Basic Details, Images, Pricing & Tax, Variants)
Dropdown menu works - shows View Details, Share on WhatsApp, Delete Product options
Search functionality works - filtering 'SHOES' returned 2 products correctly
Stats bar shows product count, in-stock count, and low stock count

manifest_json.details: Properly configured with app name, icons, shortcuts, theme colors

service_worker.details: Registers on page load, implements caching strategies for offline support

app_icon.details: SVG icon at /icons/icon.svg with BijnisBooks branding

pwa_install_prompt.details: PWAInstallPrompt component exists but beforeinstallprompt event doesn't fire in automated browser (expected behavior)

product_cards.dropdown_menu: WORKING - View Details, Share, Delete options

critical_code_review_comments: PWA implementation is complete with manifest.json, sw.js, and PWAInstallPrompt component
Service worker has proper caching strategies (network-first for API, cache-first for static assets)
Item Catalogue uses responsive Tailwind classes for grid layout (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5)
mobile.css has specific rule to keep catalogue at 2 columns on mobile: [data-testid='items-page'] > .grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr) !important; }
Product cards have proper hover states with group-hover classes for overlay visibility

success_rate.backend: N/A (PWA files served correctly, no backend API changes needed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA implementation complete - manifest.json, sw.js, icon.svg all accessible. Service Worker registers successfully. Item Catalogue redesign complete with Product Photography Style cards, responsive grid (2-col mobile, 5-col desktop), discount badges, stock badges, hover overlays, edit/dropdown functionality. All features working correctly.
